commands.command: command -v gitleaks; gitleaks git --help | sed -n '1,180p'; git rev-parse --help 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,80p'
commands.purpose: Verify local gitleaks git supports --log-opts and inspect git rev-parse help locally.
commands.observed_result: gitleaks was found at /opt/homebrew/bin/gitleaks; help output includes gitleaks git usage and --log-opts string.

commands.command:
tmp=$(mktemp -d /private/tmp/cl-rkww-gitleaks.XXXXXX); cd "$tmp" || exit 1; git init >/dev/null; git config core.hooksPath .git/hooks; git config user.email test@example.test; git config user.name 'Test User'; git commit --allow-empty -m base >/dev/null; base=$(git rev-parse HEAD); printf '%s
' '<AGE-shaped sentinel redacted from ledger>' > secret.txt; git add secret.txt; git commit -m 'add secret' >/dev/null; head=$(git rev-parse HEAD); mkdir -p .git/hooks; cp -f /Users/malte/code/library/meta/.claude/worktrees/bead-CL-rkww/prime/hooks/pre-push.sh .git/hooks/pre-push; chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-push; printf 'refs/heads/main %s refs/heads/main %s
' "$head" "$base" | .git/hooks/pre-push origin url; rc=$?; printf 'hook_exit=%s
repo=%s
' "$rc" "$tmp"; exit 0
commands.purpose: Prove a secret-bearing outgoing range blocks push with the real gitleaks binary and default rules.
commands.observed_result: gitleaks reported leaks found: 2 and the hook printed hook_exit=2.

' "$head" "$base" | .git/hooks/pre-push origin url; rc=$?; printf 'hook_exit=%s

skipped_checks.check: Successful canonical metrics insert through insert_agent_call
skipped_checks.reason: The metrics helper attempted to write the canonical metrics database under the beads runtime state, but that database is read-only under the current workspace-write sandbox. A db_path override would write to a different database without the canonical bead_runs row, so it would not satisfy the intended run metrics record.

Not attempted. The new pre-push hook correctly blocks the current local branch range because older local evidence commits contain a secret-shaped sentinel. Attempts to rewrite/squash those local evidence commits with git reset --soft and commit-tree/update-ref were blocked by sandbox write restrictions on the shared gitdir.
